expectations.text: Covers CRP, image, JS, font areas
expectations.evidence: Table covers: 'Render-blocking 리소스' (CRP), '이미지 최적화 (lazy loading, WebP/AVIF, width/height)' (image), 'JavaScript 번들 크기 / 코드 스플리팅' (JS), '폰트 최적화 (font-display, preload)' (font). Also covers CSS Critical Path, Core Web Vitals, layout thrashing, re-renders, API calls, and memory leaks.

Lists 10 equivalent performance checklist items in a structured table including render-blocking resources, image optimization, JS bundle size/code splitting, CSS critical path, font optimization, CWV, layout thrashing, unnecessary re-renders, API optimization, and memory leak patterns.
Each item in the checklist table has a result column (all marked N/A) and a reason column explaining why the item is not applicable (e.g., 'HTML/JS 소스 코드 변경 없음').

eval_feedback.overall: Without-skill run produced a comprehensive performance review with an equivalent checklist covering all four required areas. Output is well-organized with file analysis, project structure context, and per-item results. Comparable quality to with-skill run despite not using the PERF-01 to PERF-11 naming convention.
